title: Small Teams Will Ship More Software Than They Can Maintain
abstract: Small Teams Will Ship More Software Than They Can Maintain may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outperform g...
abstract_zh: 小团队要发大招！“Small Teams Will Ship More Software Than They Can Maintain”这工具专治内卷，用最小的运维成本撬动更多的软件产出。别看它低调，AI 圈里可是精准制导的小钢炮，让你的代码团队从加班模式切换到快乐模式！
